revision.comment: 新しいページ：オーコ8号墳（大阪府羽曳野市にある古墳）。
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称 = オーコ8号墳 |画像 = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1.jpg|280px]]
[[横口式石槨]]開口部 |別名 = オーコー8号墳/王公塚古墳 |所属 = オーコ古墳群 |所在地 = [[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 32|緯度秒 = 25.75 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 38|経度秒 = 33.42 |ISO = JP-27 |形状 = （推定）[[円墳]] |規模 = 直径13m |埋葬施設 = [[横口式石槨]] |出土品 = |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[7世紀]]代 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = なし |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Osaka |アイコン = 円墳 |ラベル = オーコ8号墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''オーコ8号墳'''（オーコはちごうふん、王公塚古墳）は、[[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[円墳]]と推定される。オーコ古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。史跡指定はされていない。 == 概要 == 大阪府東部、[[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|観音塚古墳]]の北東の、南東方向に延びる尾根稜線上に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。これまでに発掘調査は実施されていない。 形状は円形と推定され、直径13メートル程度と見積もられる{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。主体部の埋葬施設は[[横口式石槨]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨の前面に前室・羨道を付すという石棺系横口式石槨の特徴を示す。石槨の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。 :* 石槨部：長さ1.9メートル、幅0.75メートル、高さ0.6メートル :* 入口部：幅0.58メートル、高さ0.57メートル :* 前室・羨道：長さ5.56メートル、幅1.34メートル。 石槨の石材は石英[[安山岩]]の切石。石槨部は、底石・奥石では各1石、左右両側壁・天井部では各2石で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。前室は東側壁5枚・西側壁6枚・天井石3枚で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。特に、南端の天井石では南端から約10センチメートル内側に溝が穿たれている{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。羨道は左右両側壁とも各2石で構築されるが、天井石はない（築造当初から墳丘外に露出）{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨部と前室部の天井と側壁との接点には漆食の痕跡が認められる。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]代と推定される。 File:Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku.jpg|石槨部 File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2.jpg|石槨部（開口部） File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1.jpg|石槨前室（石槨部方向） File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3.jpg|石槨前室（開口部方向） File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|石槨前室 天井石の溝 File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2.jpg|石槨開口部 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=王公塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 28 大阪府の地名|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}}} == 関連項目 == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)]] * [[鉢伏山西峰古墳]] {{デフォルトソート:おーこはちこうふん}} [[Category:大阪府の古墳]] [[Category:羽曳野市の歴史]] [[Category:円墳]]

{{単一の出典|date=2020年5月}} {{日本の古墳 |名称 = オーコ8号墳 |画像 = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1.jpg|250px]] |画像キャプション = [[横口式石槨]]開口部 |別名 = オーコー8号墳/王公塚古墳 |所属 = オーコ古墳群 |所在地 = [[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 32|緯度秒 = 25.75 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 38|経度秒 = 33.42 |ISO = JP-27 |形状 = （推定）[[円墳]] |規模 = 直径13 [[メートル|m]] |埋葬施設 = [[横口式石槨]] |出土品 = |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[7世紀]]代 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = なし |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Osaka |アイコン = 円墳 |ラベル = オーコ8号墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''オーコ8号墳'''（オーコはちごうふん、王公塚古墳）は、[[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[円墳]]と推定される。オーコ古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。史跡指定はされていない。
== 概要 == 大阪府東部、[[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|観音塚古墳]]の北東の、南東方向に延びる尾根稜線上に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|平凡社地方資料センター|1986}}。これまでに発掘調査は実施されていない。
形状は円形と推定され、直径13メートル程度と見積もられる{{Sfn|平凡社地方資料センター|1986}}。主体部の埋葬施設は[[横口式石槨]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|平凡社地方資料センター|1986}}。石槨の前面に前室・羨道を付すという石棺系横口式石槨の特徴を示す。石槨の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|平凡社地方資料センター|1986}}。 * 石槨部：長さ1.9メートル、幅0.75メートル、高さ0.6メートル * 入口部：幅0.58メートル、高さ0.57メートル * 前室・羨道：長さ5.56メートル、幅1.34メートル。 石槨の石材は石英[[安山岩]]の切石。石槨部は、底石・奥石では各1石、左右両側壁・天井部では各2石で構築される{{Sfn|平凡社地方資料センター|1986}}。前室は東側壁5枚・西側壁6枚・天井石3枚で構築される{{Sfn|平凡社地方資料センター|1986}}。特に、南端の天井石では南端から約10センチメートル内側に溝が穿たれている{{Sfn|平凡社地方資料センター|1986}}。羨道は左右両側壁とも各2石で構築されるが、天井石はない（築造当初から墳丘外に露出）{{Sfn|平凡社地方資料センター|1986}}。石槨部と前室部の天井と側壁との接点には漆食の痕跡が認められる。
築造時期は、[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]代と推定される。 <gallery> File:Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku.jpg|石槨部 File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2.jpg|石槨部（開口部） File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1.jpg|石槨前室（石槨部方向） File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3.jpg|石槨前室（開口部方向） File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|石槨前室 天井石の溝 File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2.jpg|石槨開口部 </gallery>

== 参考文献 == * {{Cite book |和書 |editor=平凡社地方資料センター |title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] |date=1986-02 |volume=28（大阪府の地名） |publisher=[[平凡社]] |isbn=4-582-49028-X |chapter=王公塚古墳 |ref=harv}}

{{日本の古墳 |名称 = オーコ8号墳 |画像 = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1.jpg|280px]]
[[横口式石槨]]開口部 |別名 = オーコー8号墳/オウコ8号墳/王公塚古墳 |所属 = オーコ古墳群 |所在地 = [[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 32|緯度秒 = 25.75 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 38|経度秒 = 33.42 |ISO = JP-27 |形状 = [[方墳]]または[[円墳]] |規模 = 一辺（直径）20[[メートル|m]] |埋葬施設 = [[横口式石槨]] |出土品 = |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[7世紀]]中葉 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = なし |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Osaka |アイコン = |ラベル = オーコ8号墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''オーコ8号墳'''（オーコはちごうふん、オウコ8号墳[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳]（羽曳野市ホームページ）。/王公塚古墳）は、[[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[方墳]]または[[円墳]]。オーコ古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。史跡指定はされていない。 == 概要 == 大阪府東部、[[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|観音塚古墳]]の北東の、南東方向に延びる尾根稜線上に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。これまでに発掘調査は実施されていない。 形状は方形または円形で、直径（一辺）約20メートルを測る。主体部の埋葬施設は[[横口式石槨]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨の前面に前室・羨道を付すという石棺系横口式石槨の特徴を示す。石槨の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。 * 石槨部：長さ1.9メートル、幅0.75メートル、高さ0.6メートル * 入口部：幅0.58メートル、高さ0.57メートル * 前室・羨道：長さ5.56メートル、幅1.34メートル。 石槨の石材は石英[[安山岩]]の切石。石槨部は、底石・奥石では各1石、左右両側壁・天井部では各2石で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。前室は東側壁5枚・西側壁6枚・天井石3枚で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。特に、南端の天井石では南端から約10センチメートル内側に溝が穿たれている{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。羨道は左右両側壁とも各2石で構築されるが、天井石はない（築造当初から墳丘外に露出）{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨部と前室部の天井と側壁との接点には漆食の痕跡が認められる。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]中葉頃と推定される。 File:Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku.jpg|石槨部 File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2.jpg|石槨部（開口部） File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1.jpg|石槨前室（石槨部方向） File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3.jpg|石槨前室（開口部方向） File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|石槨前室 天井石の溝 File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2.jpg|石槨開口部 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=王公塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 28 大阪府の地名|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}}} == 関連項目 == * [[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)]] * [[鉢伏山西峰古墳]] == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳] - {{日本の古墳 |名称 = オーコ8号墳 |画像 = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1.jpg|280px]]
[[横口式石槨]]開口部 |別名 = オーコー8号墳/オウコ8号墳/王公塚古墳 |所属 = オーコ古墳群 |所在地 = [[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 32|緯度秒 = 25.75 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 38|経度秒 = 33.42 |ISO = JP-27 |形状 = [[方墳]]または[[円墳]] |規模 = 一辺（直径）20[[メートル|m]] |埋葬施設 = [[横口式石槨]] |出土品 = |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[7世紀]]中葉 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = なし |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Osaka |アイコン = |ラベル = オーコ8号墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''オーコ8号墳'''（オーコはちごうふん、オウコ8号墳[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳]（羽曳野市ホームページ）。/王公塚古墳）は、[[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[方墳]]または[[円墳]]。オーコ古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。史跡指定はされていない。 == 概要 == 大阪府東部、[[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|観音塚古墳]]の北東の、南東方向に延びる尾根稜線上に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。これまでに発掘調査は実施されていない。 形状は方形または円形で、直径（一辺）約20メートルを測る。埋葬施設は[[横口式石槨]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨の前面に前室・羨道を付すという石棺系横口式石槨の特徴を示す。石槨の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。 * 石槨部：長さ1.9メートル、幅0.75メートル、高さ0.6メートル * 入口部：幅0.58メートル、高さ0.57メートル * 前室・羨道：長さ5.56メートル、幅1.34メートル。 石槨の石材は石英[[安山岩]]の切石。石槨部は、底石・奥石では各1石、左右両側壁・天井部では各2石で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。前室は東側壁5枚・西側壁6枚・天井石3枚で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。特に、南端の天井石では南端から約10センチメートル内側に溝が穿たれている{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。羨道は左右両側壁とも各2石で構築されるが、天井石はない（築造当初から墳丘外に露出）{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨部と前室部の天井と側壁との接点には漆食の痕跡が認められる。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]中葉頃と推定される。 File:Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku.jpg|石槨部 File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2.jpg|石槨部（開口部） File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1.jpg|石槨前室（石槨部方向） File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3.jpg|石槨前室（開口部方向） File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|石槨前室 天井石の溝 File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2.jpg|石槨開口部 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=王公塚古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 28 大阪府の地名|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}}} == 関連項目 == * [[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)]] * [[鉢伏山西峰古墳]] == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳] - |埋葬施設 = [[横口式石槨]] |出土品 = |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[7世紀]]中葉 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = なし |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Osaka |アイコン = |ラベル = オーコ8号墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''オーコ8号墳'''（オーコはちごうふん、オウコ8号墳[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳]（羽曳野市ホームページ）。/王公塚古墳）は、[[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[方墳]]または[[円墳]]。オーコ古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。史跡指定はされていない。 == 概要 == 大阪府東部、[[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|観音塚古墳]]の北東の、南東方向に延びる尾根稜線上に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。これまでに発掘調査は実施されていない。 形状は方形または円形で、直径（一辺）約20メートルを測る。埋葬施設は[[横口式石槨]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨の前面に前室・羨道を付すという石棺系横口式石槨の特徴を示す。石槨の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。 * 石槨部：長さ1.9メートル、幅0.75メートル、高さ0.6メートル * 入口部：幅0.58メートル、高さ0.57メートル * 前室・羨道：長さ5.56メートル、幅1.34メートル。 石槨の石材は石英[[安山岩]]の切石。石槨部は、底石・奥石では各1石、左右両側壁・天井部では各2石で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。前室は東側壁5枚・西側壁6枚・天井石3枚で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。特に、南端の天井石では南端から約10センチメートル内側に溝が穿たれている{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。羨道は左右両側壁とも各2石で構築されるが、天井石はない（築造当初から墳丘外に露出）{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨部と前室部の天井と側壁との接点には漆食の痕跡が認められる。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]中葉頃と推定される。 File:Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku.jpg|石槨部 File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2.jpg|石槨部（開口部） File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1.jpg|石槨前室（石槨部方向） File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3.jpg|石槨前室（開口部方向） File:Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|石槨前室 天井石の溝 File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2.jpg|石槨開口部 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == revision.text:
{{Japanese Kofun Infobox | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alias = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Tumulus | group = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | latitude = 34.54049 | longitude = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | size = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial_chamber = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | artifacts = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | occupant = Unknown | historic_site = Not designated | cultural_property = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Tumulus) is a [[kofun]] (ancient burial mound) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been designated as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)|Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The dimensions are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|Groove on the front chamber ceiling stone Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|Chamber entrance == References == {{Footnotes}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|(Sources used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=Ōkō Tumulus|title=Osaka Prefecture Topography|series=[[Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei]] 28|publisher=[[Heibonsha]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not directly used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=Oko Kofun Group|title=Habikino City History|volume=Volume 3, Historical Records 1|publisher=Habikino City|isbn=|ref=}} == See Also == * [[Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)]] * [[Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] - Habikino City Website {{DEFAULTSORT:Oko No. 8 Kofun}} [[Category:Kofun in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Habikino City]]

{{Japanese Kofun Infobox | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]

It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been designated as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)|Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The dimensions are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. {{Japanese Kofun Infobox | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alias = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Tumulus | group = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | latitude = 34.54049 | longitude = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | size = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial_chamber = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | artifacts = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | occupant = Unknown | historic_site = Not designated | cultural_property = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Tumulus) is a [[kofun]] (ancient burial mound) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been designated as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)|Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The dimensions are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[Category:New pages]][[Category:New pages]][[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. {{Japanese Kofun Infobox | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alias = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Tumulus | group = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | latitude = 34.54049 | longitude = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | size = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial_chamber = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | artifacts = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | occupant = Unknown | historic_site = Not designated | cultural_property = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Tumulus) is a [[kofun]] (ancient burial mound) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been designated as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)|Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The dimensions are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. revision.text:
{{Japanese Kofun Infobox | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alias = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Tumulus | group = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | latitude = 34.54049 | longitude = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | size = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial_chamber = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | artifacts = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | occupant = Unknown | historic_site = Not designated | cultural_property = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Tumulus) is a [[kofun]] (ancient burial mound) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been designated as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)|Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The dimensions are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. {{Japanese Kofun Infobox | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alias = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Tumulus | group = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | latitude = 34.54049 | longitude = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | size = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial_chamber = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | artifacts = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | occupant = Unknown | historic_site = Not designated | cultural_property = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Tumulus) is a [[kofun]] (ancient burial mound) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been designated as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)|Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The dimensions are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. revision.text:
{{Japanese Kofun Infobox | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alias = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Tumulus | group = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | latitude = 34.54049 | longitude = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | size = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial_chamber = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | artifacts = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | occupant = Unknown | historic_site = Not designated | cultural_property = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Tumulus) is a [[kofun]] (ancient burial mound) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been designated as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The dimensions are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The dimensions are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. revision.text:
{{Japanese Kofun Infobox | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alias = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Tumulus | group = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | latitude = 34.54049 | longitude = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | size = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial_chamber = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | artifacts = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | occupant = Unknown | historic_site = Not designated | cultural_property = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Tumulus) is a [[kofun]] (ancient burial mound) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been designated as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The dimensions are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. {{Japanese Kofun Infobox | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alias = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Tumulus | group = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | latitude = 34.54049 | longitude = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | size = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial_chamber = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | artifacts = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | occupant = Unknown | historic_site = Not designated | cultural_property = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Tumulus) is a [[kofun]] (ancient burial mound) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been designated as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The dimensions are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|Groove on the front chamber ceiling stone Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|Chamber entrance == References == {{Footnotes}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|(Sources used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=Ōkō Tumulus|title=Osaka Prefecture Topography|series=[[Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei]] 28|publisher=[[Heibonsha]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not directly used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=Oko Kofun Group|title=Habikino City History|volume=Volume 3, Historical Records 1|publisher=Habikino City|isbn=|ref=}} == See Also == * [[Kannonzuka Kofun|Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)]] * [[Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] - {{日本の古墳 |名称 = オーコ8号墳 |画像 = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[横口式石槨]]開口部 |別名 = オーコー8号墳/オウコ8号墳/王公塚古墳 |所属 = オーコ古墳群 |所在地 = [[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 32|緯度秒 = 25.75 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 38|経度秒 = 33.42 |ISO = JP-27 |形状 = [[方墳]]または[[円墳]] |規模 = 一辺（直径）20[[メートル|m]] |埋葬施設 = [[横口式石槨]] |出土品 = |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[7世紀]]中葉 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = なし |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Osaka |アイコン = |ラベル = オーコ8号墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''オーコ8号墳'''（オーコはちごうふん、オウコ8号墳[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳]（羽曳野市ホームページ）。/王公塚古墳）は、[[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[方墳]]または[[円墳]]。オーコ古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。史跡指定はされていない。 == 概要 == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|石槨俯瞰図}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石槨展開図}}]] 大阪府東部、[[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|観音塚古墳]]の北東の、南東方向に延びる尾根稜線上に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。これまでに発掘調査は実施されていない。 形状は方形または円形で、直径（一辺）約20メートルを測る。埋葬施設は[[横口式石槨]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨の前面に前室・羨道を付すという石棺系横口式石槨の特徴を示す。石槨の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。 * 石槨部：長さ1.9メートル、幅0.75メートル、高さ0.6メートル * 入口部：幅0.58メートル、高さ0.57メートル * 前室・羨道：長さ5.56メートル、幅1.34メートル 石槨の石材は石英[[安山岩]]の切石。石槨部は、底石・奥石では各1石、左右両側壁・天井部では各2石で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。前室は東側壁5枚・西側壁6枚・天井石3枚{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。特に、南端の天井石では南端から約10センチメートル内側に溝が穿たれている{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。羨道は左右両側壁とも各2石で構築されるが、天井石はない（築造当初から墳丘外に露出）{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨部と前室部の天井と側壁との接点には漆食の痕跡が認められる。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]中葉頃と推定される。 Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|石槨部（奥壁方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|石槨部（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|石槨部開口部 Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|石槨前室（石槨部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|石槨前室（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|石槨前室 天井石の溝 Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|石槨開口部 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=王公塚古墳|title=大阪府の地名|series=[[日本歴史地名大系]]28|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=オウコ古墳群|title=羽曳野市史|volume=第3巻 史料編1|publisher=羽曳野市|isbn=|ref=}} == 関連項目 == * [[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)]] * [[鉢伏山西峰古墳]] == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳] - 羽曳野市ホームページ '''オーコ8号墳'''（オーコはちごうふん、オウコ8号墳[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳]（羽曳野市ホームページ）。/王公塚古墳）は、[[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[方墳]]または[[円墳]]。オーコ古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。史跡指定はされていない。 == 概要 == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|石槨俯瞰図}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石槨展開図}}]] 大阪府東部、[[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|観音塚古墳]]の北東の、南東方向に延びる尾根稜線上に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。これまでに発掘調査は実施されていない。 形状は方形または円形で、直径（一辺）約20メートルを測る。埋葬施設は[[横口式石槨]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨の前面に前室・羨道を付すという石棺系横口式石槨の特徴を示す。石槨の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。 * 石槨部：長さ1.9メートル、幅0.75メートル、高さ0.6メートル * 入口部：幅0.58メートル、高さ0.57メートル * 前室・羨道：長さ5.56メートル、幅1.34メートル 石槨の石材は石英[[安山岩]]の切石。石槨部は、底石・奥石では各1石、左右両側壁・天井部では各2石で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。前室は東側壁5枚・西側壁6枚・天井石3枚{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。特に、南端の天井石では南端から約10センチメートル内側に溝が穿たれている{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。羨道は左右両側壁とも各2石で構築されるが、天井石はない（築造当初から墳丘外に露出）{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨部と前室部の天井と側壁との接点には漆食の痕跡が認められる。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]中葉頃と推定される。 Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|石槨部（奥壁方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|石槨部（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|石槨部開口部 Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|石槨前室（石槨部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|石槨前室（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|石槨前室 天井石の溝 Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|石槨開口部 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == {{日本の古墳 |名称 = オーコ8号墳 |image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[横口式石槨]]開口部 |別名 = オーコー8号墳/オウコ8号墳/王公塚古墳 |所属 = オーコ古墳群 |所在地 = [[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 32|緯度秒 = 25.75 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 38|経度秒 = 33.42 |ISO = JP-27 |形状 = [[方墳]]または[[円墳]] |規模 = 一辺（直径）20[[メートル|m]] |埋葬施設 = [[横口式石槨]] |出土品 = |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[7世紀]]中葉 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = なし |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Osaka |アイコン = |ラベル = オーコ8号墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''オーコ8号墳'''（オーコはちごうふん、オウコ8号墳[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳]（羽曳野市ホームページ）。/王公塚古墳）は、[[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[方墳]]または[[円墳]]。オーコ古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。史跡指定はされていない。 == 概要 == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|石槨俯瞰図}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石槨展開図}}]] 大阪府東部、[[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|観音塚古墳]]の北東の、南東方向に延びる尾根稜線上に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。これまでに発掘調査は実施されていない。 形状は方形または円形で、直径（一辺）約20メートルを測る。埋葬施設は[[横口式石槨]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨の前面に前室・羨道を付すという石棺系横口式石槨の特徴を示す。石槨の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。 * 石槨部：長さ1.9メートル、幅0.75メートル、高さ0.6メートル * 入口部：幅0.58メートル、高さ0.57メートル * 前室・羨道：長さ5.56メートル、幅1.34メートル 石槨の石材は石英[[安山岩]]の切石。石槨部は、底石・奥石では各1石、左右両側壁・天井部では各2石で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。前室は東側壁5枚・西側壁6枚・天井石3枚{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。特に、南端の天井石では南端から約10センチメートル内側に溝が穿たれている{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。羨道は左右両側壁とも各2石で構築されるが、天井石はない（築造当初から墳丘外に露出）{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨部と前室部の天井と側壁との接点には漆食の痕跡が認められる。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]中葉頃と推定される。 Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|石槨部（奥壁方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|石槨部（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|石槨部開口部 Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|石槨前室（石槨部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|石槨前室（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|石槨前室 天井石の溝 Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|石槨開口部 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=王公塚古墳|title=大阪府の地名|series=[[日本歴史地名大系]]28|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=オウコ古墳群|title=羽曳野市史|volume=第3巻 史料編1|publisher=羽曳野市|isbn=|ref=}} == 関連項目 == * [[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)]] * [[鉢伏山西峰古墳]] == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳] - 羽曳野市ホームページ {{Japanese Kofun Infobox | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alias = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Tumulus | group = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | latitude = 34.54049 | longitude = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | size = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial_chamber = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | artifacts = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | occupant = Unknown | historic_site = Not designated | cultural_property = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Tumulus) is a [[kofun]] (ancient burial mound) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been designated as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The dimensions are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. {{日本の古墳 |名称 = オーコ8号墳 |image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[横口式石槨]]開口部 |別名 = オーコー8号墳/オウコ8号墳/王公塚古墳 |所属 = オーコ古墳群 |所在地 = [[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 32|緯度秒 = 25.75 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 38|経度秒 = 33.42 |ISO = JP-27 |形状 = [[方墳]]または[[円墳]] |規模 = 一辺（直径）20[[メートル|m]] |埋葬施設 = [[横口式石槨]] |出土品 = |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[7世紀]]中葉 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = なし |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Osaka |アイコン = |ラベル = オーコ8号墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''オーコ8号墳'''（オーコはちごうふん、オウコ8号墳[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳]（羽曳野市ホームページ）。/王公塚古墳）は、[[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[方墳]]または[[円墳]]。オーコ古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。史跡指定はされていない。 == 概要 == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|石槨俯瞰図}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石槨展開図}}]] 大阪府東部、[[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|観音塚古墳]]の北東の、南東方向に延びる尾根稜線上に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。これまでに発掘調査は実施されていない。 形状は方形または円形で、直径（一辺）約20メートルを測る。埋葬施設は[[横口式石槨]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨の前面に前室・羨道を付すという石棺系横口式石槨の特徴を示す。石槨の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。 * 石槨部：長さ1.9メートル、幅0.75メートル、高さ0.6メートル * 入口部：幅0.58メートル、高さ0.57メートル * 前室・羨道：長さ5.56メートル、幅1.34メートル 石槨の石材は石英[[安山岩]]の切石。石槨部は、底石・奥石では各1石、左右両側壁・天井部では各2石で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。前室は東側壁5枚・西側壁6枚・天井石3枚{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。特に、南端の天井石では南端から約10センチメートル内側に溝が穿たれている{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。羨道は左右両側壁とも各2石で構築されるが、天井石はない（築造当初から墳丘外に露出）{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨部と前室部の天井と側壁との接点には漆食の痕跡が認められる。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]中葉頃と推定される。 Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|石槨部（奥壁方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|石槨部（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|石槨部開口部 Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|石槨前室（石槨部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|石槨前室（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|石槨前室 天井石の溝 Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|石槨開口部 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == {{Japanese Kofun Infobox | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alias = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Tumulus | group = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | latitude = 34.54049 | longitude = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | size = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial_chamber = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | artifacts = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | occupant = Unknown | historic_site = Not designated | cultural_property = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Tumulus) is a [[kofun]] (ancient burial mound) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been designated as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The dimensions are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. {{日本の古墳 |名称 = オーコ8号墳 |image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[横口式石槨]]開口部 |別名 = オーコー8号墳/オウコ8号墳/王公塚古墳 |所属 = オーコ古墳群 |所在地 = [[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 32|緯度秒 = 25.75 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 38|経度秒 = 33.42 |ISO = JP-27 |形状 = [[方墳]]または[[円墳]] |規模 = 一辺（直径）20[[メートル|m]] |埋葬施設 = [[横口式石槨]] |出土品 = |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[7世紀]]中葉 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = なし |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Osaka |アイコン = |ラベル = オーコ8号墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''オーコ8号墳'''（オーコはちごうふん、オウコ8号墳[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳]（羽曳野市ホームページ）。/王公塚古墳）は、[[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[方墳]]または[[円墳]]。オーコ古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。史跡指定はされていない。 == 概要 == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|石槨俯瞰図}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石槨展開図}}]] 大阪府東部、[[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|観音塚古墳]]の北東の、南東方向に延びる尾根稜線上に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。これまでに発掘調査は実施されていない。 形状は方形または円形で、直径（一辺）約20メートルを測る。埋葬施設は[[横口式石槨]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨の前面に前室・羨道を付すという石棺系横口式石槨の特徴を示す。石槨の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。 * 石槨部：長さ1.9メートル、幅0.75メートル、高さ0.6メートル * 入口部：幅0.58メートル、高さ0.57メートル * 前室・羨道：長さ5.56メートル、幅1.34メートル 石槨の石材は石英[[安山岩]]の切石。石槨部は、底石・奥石では各1石、左右両側壁・天井部では各2石で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。前室は東側壁5枚・西側壁6枚・天井石3枚{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。特に、南端の天井石では南端から約10センチメートル内側に溝が穿たれている{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。羨道は左右両側壁とも各2石で構築されるが、天井石はない（築造当初から墳丘外に露出）{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨部と前室部の天井と側壁との接点には漆食の痕跡が認められる。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]中葉頃と推定される。 Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|石槨部（奥壁方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|石槨部（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|石槨部開口部 Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|石槨前室（石槨部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|石槨前室（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|石槨前室 天井石の溝 Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|石槨開口部 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=王公塚古墳|title=大阪府の地名|series=[[日本歴史地名大系]]28|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=オウコ古墳群|title=羽曳野市史|volume=第3巻 史料編1|publisher=羽曳野市|isbn=|ref=}} == 関連項目 == * [[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)]] * [[鉢伏山西峰古墳]] == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳] - 羽曳野市ホームページ {{citation revision.comment: Text replacement - "== 概要 ==" to "== Overview =="
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称 = オーコ8号墳 |image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[横口式石槨]]開口部 |別名 = オーコー8号墳/オウコ8号墳/王公塚古墳 |所属 = オーコ古墳群 |所在地 = [[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 32|緯度秒 = 25.75 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 38|経度秒 = 33.42 |ISO = JP-27 |形状 = [[方墳]]または[[円墳]] |規模 = 一辺（直径）20[[メートル|m]] |埋葬施設 = [[横口式石槨]] |出土品 = |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[7世紀]]中葉 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = なし |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Osaka |アイコン = |ラベル = オーコ8号墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''オーコ8号墳'''（オーコはちごうふん、オウコ8号墳[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳]（羽曳野市ホームページ）。/王公塚古墳）は、[[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[方墳]]または[[円墳]]。オーコ古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。史跡指定はされていない。 == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|石槨俯瞰図}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石槨展開図}}]] 大阪府東部、[[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|観音塚古墳]]の北東の、南東方向に延びる尾根稜線上に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。これまでに発掘調査は実施されていない。 形状は方形または円形で、直径（一辺）約20メートルを測る。埋葬施設は[[横口式石槨]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨の前面に前室・羨道を付すという石棺系横口式石槨の特徴を示す。石槨の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。 * 石槨部：長さ1.9メートル、幅0.75メートル、高さ0.6メートル * 入口部：幅0.58メートル、高さ0.57メートル * 前室・羨道：長さ5.56メートル、幅1.34メートル 石槨の石材は石英[[安山岩]]の切石。石槨部は、底石・奥石では各1石、左右両側壁・天井部では各2石で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。前室は東側壁5枚・西側壁6枚・天井石3枚{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。特に、南端の天井石では南端から約10センチメートル内側に溝が穿たれている{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。羨道は左右両側壁とも各2石で構築されるが、天井石はない（築造当初から墳丘外に露出）{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨部と前室部の天井と側壁との接点には漆食の痕跡が認められる。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]中葉頃と推定される。 Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|石槨部（奥壁方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|石槨部（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|石槨部開口部 Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|石槨前室（石槨部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|石槨前室（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|石槨前室 天井石の溝 Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|石槨開口部 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=王公塚古墳|title=大阪府の地名|series=[[日本歴史地名大系]]28|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=オウコ古墳群|title=羽曳野市史|volume=第3巻 史料編1|publisher=羽曳野市|isbn=|ref=}} == 関連項目 == * [[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)]] * [[鉢伏山西峰古墳]] == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳] - 羽曳野市ホームページ {{citation {{日本の古墳 |名称 = オーコ8号墳 |image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[横口式石槨]]開口部 |別名 = オーコー8号墳/オウコ8号墳/王公塚古墳 |所属 = オーコ古墳群 |所在地 = [[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 32|緯度秒 = 25.75 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 38|経度秒 = 33.42 |ISO = JP-27 |形状 = [[方墳]]または[[円墳]] |規模 = 一辺（直径）20[[メートル|m]] |埋葬施設 = [[横口式石槨]] |出土品 = |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[7世紀]]中葉 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = なし |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Osaka |アイコン = |ラベル = オーコ8号墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''オーコ8号墳'''（オーコはちごうふん、オウコ8号墳[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳]（羽曳野市ホームページ）。/王公塚古墳）は、[[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[方墳]]または[[円墳]]。オーコ古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。史跡指定はされていない。 == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|石槨俯瞰図}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石槨展開図}}]] 大阪府東部、[[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|観音塚古墳]]の北東の、南東方向に延びる尾根稜線上に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。これまでに発掘調査は実施されていない。 形状は方形または円形で、直径（一辺）約20メートルを測る。埋葬施設は[[横口式石槨]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨の前面に前室・羨道を付すという石棺系横口式石槨の特徴を示す。石槨の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。 * 石槨部：長さ1.9メートル、幅0.75メートル、高さ0.6メートル * 入口部：幅0.58メートル、高さ0.57メートル * 前室・羨道：長さ5.56メートル、幅1.34メートル 石槨の石材は石英[[安山岩]]の切石。石槨部は、底石・奥石では各1石、左右両側壁・天井部では各2石で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。前室は東側壁5枚・西側壁6枚・天井石3枚{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。特に、南端の天井石では南端から約10センチメートル内側に溝が穿たれている{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。羨道は左右両側壁とも各2石で構築されるが、天井石はない（築造当初から墳丘外に露出）{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨部と前室部の天井と側壁との接点には漆食の痕跡が認められる。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]中葉頃と推定される。 Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|石槨部（奥壁方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|石槨部（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|石槨部開口部 Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|石槨前室（石槨部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|石槨前室（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|石槨前室 天井石の溝 Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|石槨開口部 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=王公塚古墳|title=大阪府の地名|series=[[日本歴史地名大系]]28|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=オウコ古墳群|title=羽曳野市史|volume=第3巻 史料編1|publisher=羽曳野市|isbn=|ref=}} == 関連項目 == * [[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)]] * [[鉢伏山西峰古墳]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳] - 羽曳野市ホームページ {{Japanese Kofun Infobox | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alias = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Tumulus | group = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | latitude = 34.54049 | longitude = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | size = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial_chamber = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | artifacts = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | occupant = Unknown | historic_site = Not designated | cultural_property = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Tumulus) is a [[kofun]] (ancient burial mound) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been designated as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The dimensions are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Qq deprecated close]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Japanese Kofun Infobox | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alias = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Tumulus | group = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | latitude = 34.54049 | longitude = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | size = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial_chamber = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | artifacts = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | occupant = Unknown | historic_site = Not designated | cultural_property = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Tumulus) is a [[kofun]] (ancient burial mound) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been designated as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The dimensions are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|Groove on the front chamber ceiling stone Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|Chamber entrance == References == {{Footnotes}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|(Sources used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=Ōkō Tumulus|title=Osaka Prefecture Topography|series=[[Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei]] 28|publisher=[[Heibonsha]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not directly used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=Oko Kofun Group|title=Habikino City History|volume=Volume 3, Historical Records 1|publisher=Habikino City|isbn=|ref=}} == See Also == * [[Kannonzuka Kofun|Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)]] * [[Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] - Habikino City Website {{DEFAULTSORT:Oko No. 8 Kofun}} [[Category:Kofun in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Habikino City]] [[Category:pp]][[category:Oko Kofun Group]][[Category:pp]] [[Category:pp]][[category:Oko Kofun Group]][[Category:pp]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Oko Kofun Group]][[category:Oko Kofun Group]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Oko Kofun Group]][[Category:pp]][[category:Oko Kofun Group]][[Category:pp]] [[Category:pp]][[category:Oko Kofun Group]][[Category:pp]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Oko Kofun Group]][[category:Oko Kofun Group]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Oko Kofun Group]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Oko Kofun Group]][[category:Oko Kofun Group]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Oko Kofun Group]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Oko Kofun Group]][[category:Oko Kofun Group]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Oko Kofun Group]] [[sn:Oko Kofun Group]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Oko Kofun Group]][[Category:qq]]

revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称 = オーコ8号墳 |image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[横口式石槨]]開口部 |別名 = オーコー8号墳/オウコ8号墳/王公塚古墳 |所属 = オーコ古墳群 |所在地 = [[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 32|緯度秒 = 25.75 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 38|経度秒 = 33.42 |ISO = JP-27 |形状 = [[方墳]]または[[円墳]] |規模 = 一辺（直径）20[[メートル|m]] |埋葬施設 = [[横口式石槨]] |出土品 = |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[7世紀]]中葉 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = なし |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Osaka |アイコン = |ラベル = オーコ8号墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''オーコ8号墳'''（オーコはちごうふん、オウコ8号墳[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳]（羽曳野市ホームページ）。/王公塚古墳）は、[[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[方墳]]または[[円墳]]。オーコ古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。史跡指定はされていない。 == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|石槨俯瞰図}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石槨展開図}}]] 大阪府東部、[[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|観音塚古墳]]の北東の、南東方向に延びる尾根稜線上に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。これまでに発掘調査は実施されていない。 形状は方形または円形で、直径（一辺）約20メートルを測る。埋葬施設は[[横口式石槨]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨の前面に前室・羨道を付すという石棺系横口式石槨の特徴を示す。石槨の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。 * 石槨部：長さ1.9メートル、幅0.75メートル、高さ0.6メートル * 入口部：幅0.58メートル、高さ0.57メートル * 前室・羨道：長さ5.56メートル、幅1.34メートル 石槨の石材は石英[[安山岩]]の切石。石槨部は、底石・奥石では各1石、左右両側壁・天井部では各2石で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。前室は東側壁5枚・西側壁6枚・天井石3枚{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。特に、南端の天井石では南端から約10センチメートル内側に溝が穿たれている{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。羨道は左右両側壁とも各2石で構築されるが、天井石はない（築造当初から墳丘外に露出）{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨部と前室部の天井と側壁との接点には漆食の痕跡が認められる。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]中葉頃と推定される。 Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|石槨部（奥壁方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|石槨部（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|石槨部開口部 Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|石槨前室（石槨部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|石槨前室（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|石槨前室 天井石の溝 Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|石槨開口部 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=王公塚古墳|title=大阪府の地名|series=[[日本歴史地名大系]]28|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=オウコ古墳群|title=羽曳野市史|volume=第3巻 史料編1|publisher=羽曳野市|isbn=|ref=}} == 関連項目 == * [[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)]] * [[鉢伏山西峰古墳]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳] - 羽曳野市ホームページ revision.comment: Text replacement - "Japanese Kofun Infobox" to "Infobox ancient site"
revision.text:
{{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alias = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Tumulus | group = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | latitude = 34.54049 | longitude = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | size = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial_chamber = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | artifacts = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | occupant = Unknown | historic_site = Not designated | cultural_property = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Tumulus) is a [[kofun]] (ancient burial mound) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been designated as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The dimensions are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|Groove on the front chamber ceiling stone Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|Chamber entrance == References == {{Footnotes}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|(Sources used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=Ōkō Tumulus|title=Osaka Prefecture Topography|series=[[Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei]] 28|publisher=[[Heibonsha]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not directly used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=Oko Kofun Group|title=Habikino City History|volume=Volume 3, Historical Records 1|publisher=Habikino City|isbn=|ref=}} == See Also == * [[Kannonzuka Kofun|Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)]] * [[Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] - The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Tumulus (Heibonsha)|1986}}. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]].
