revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = 34.54049 | coordinates = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | size = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not other_designation1 | cultural_property = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been other_designation1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove [[Category:pp error]]approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. [[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = 34.54049 | coordinates = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not other_designation1 | cultural_property = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been other_designation1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove [[Category:pp error]]approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = 34.54049 | coordinates = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not other_designation1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been other_designation1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove [[Category:pp error]]approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = 34.54049 | coordinates = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not other_designation1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been other_designation1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove [[Category:pp error]]approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = 34.54049 | coordinates = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove [[Category:pp error]]approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = 34.54049 | coordinates = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. revision.comment: Bot: single‑shot reformat + ill→|12=draft + draft categories + iws + DEFAULTSORT + move HTML comments + meta‑cat check
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = 34.54049 | coordinates = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|Groove on the front chamber ceiling stone Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|Chamber entrance == References == {{Footnotes}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|(Sources used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=Ōkō Kofun|title=Osaka Prefecture Topography|series=[[Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei]] 28|publisher=[[Heibonsha]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not directly used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=Oko Kofun Group|title=Habikino City History|volume=Volume 3, Historical Records 1|publisher=Habikino City|isbn=|ref=}} == See Also == * [[Kannonzuka Kofun|Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)]] * [[Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] - Habikino City Website {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Habikino City]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Oko Kofun Group]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] }} [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] [[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]] [[sn:Oko Kofun Group]] [[en:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Oko No. 8 Kofun}}

The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. {{afc comment|1=See [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[Horizontal stone chamber]] entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = 34.54049 | coordinates = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = [[Horizontal stone chamber]] | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. {{afc comment|1=See [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
{{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = 34.54049 | coordinates = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|Groove on the front chamber ceiling stone Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|Chamber entrance == References == {{Footnotes}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|(Sources used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=Ōkō Kofun|title=Osaka Prefecture Topography|series=[[Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei]] 28|publisher=[[Heibonsha]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not directly used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=Oko Kofun Group|title=Habikino City History|volume=Volume 3, Historical Records 1|publisher=Habikino City|isbn=|ref=}} == See Also == * [[Kannonzuka Kofun|Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)]] * [[Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] - revision.comment: 8 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:オーコ8号墳 up to rev 100893429
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称 = オーコ8号墳 |画像 = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[横口式石槨]]開口部 |別名 = オーコー8号墳/オウコ8号墳/王公塚古墳 |所属 = オーコ古墳群 |所在地 = [[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 32|緯度秒 = 25.75 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 38|経度秒 = 33.42 |ISO = JP-27 |形状 = [[方墳]]または[[円墳]] |規模 = 一辺（直径）20[[メートル|m]] |埋葬施設 = [[横口式石槨]] |出土品 = |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[7世紀]]中葉 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = なし |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Osaka |アイコン = |ラベル = オーコ8号墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''オーコ8号墳'''（オーコはちごうふん、オウコ8号墳[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳]（羽曳野市ホームページ）。/王公塚古墳）は、[[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[方墳]]または[[円墳]]。オーコ古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。史跡指定はされていない。 == 概要 == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|石槨俯瞰図}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石槨展開図}}]] 大阪府東部、[[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|観音塚古墳]]の北東の、南東方向に延びる尾根稜線上に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。これまでに発掘調査は実施されていない。 形状は方形または円形で、直径（一辺）約20メートルを測る。埋葬施設は[[横口式石槨]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨の前面に前室・羨道を付すという石棺系横口式石槨の特徴を示す。石槨の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。 * 石槨部：長さ1.9メートル、幅0.75メートル、高さ0.6メートル * 入口部：幅0.58メートル、高さ0.57メートル * 前室・羨道：長さ5.56メートル、幅1.34メートル 石槨の石材は石英[[安山岩]]の切石。石槨部は、底石・奥石では各1石、左右両側壁・天井部では各2石で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。前室は東側壁5枚・西側壁6枚・天井石3枚{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。特に、南端の天井石では南端から約10センチメートル内側に溝が穿たれている{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。羨道は左右両側壁とも各2石で構築されるが、天井石はない（築造当初から墳丘外に露出）{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨部と前室部の天井と側壁との接点には漆食の痕跡が認められる。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]中葉頃と推定される。 Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|石槨部（奥壁方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|石槨部（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|石槨部開口部 Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|石槨前室（石槨部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|石槨前室（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|石槨前室 天井石の溝 Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|石槨開口部 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=王公塚古墳|title=大阪府の地名|series=[[日本歴史地名大系]]28|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=オウコ古墳群|title=羽曳野市史|volume=第3巻 史料編1|publisher=羽曳野市|isbn=|ref=}} == 関連項目 == * [[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)]] * [[鉢伏山西峰古墳]] == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳] - 羽曳野市ホームページ {{日本の古墳 |名称 = オーコ8号墳 |画像 = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
[[横口式石槨]]開口部 |別名 = オーコー8号墳/オウコ8号墳/王公塚古墳 |所属 = オーコ古墳群 |所在地 = [[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 32|緯度秒 = 25.75 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 38|経度秒 = 33.42 |ISO = JP-27 |形状 = [[方墳]]または[[円墳]] |規模 = 一辺（直径）20[[メートル|m]] |埋葬施設 = [[横口式石槨]] |出土品 = |陪塚 = |築造時期 = [[7世紀]]中葉 |被葬者 = |陵墓 = |史跡 = なし |有形文化財 = |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Osaka |アイコン = |ラベル = オーコ8号墳 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''オーコ8号墳'''（オーコはちごうふん、オウコ8号墳[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html オウコ8号墳]（羽曳野市ホームページ）。/王公塚古墳）は、[[大阪府]][[羽曳野市]]飛鳥にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[方墳]]または[[円墳]]。オーコ古墳群を構成する古墳の1つ。史跡指定はされていない。 == 概要 == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|石槨俯瞰図}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|石槨展開図}}]] 大阪府東部、[[観音塚古墳 (羽曳野市)|観音塚古墳]]の北東の、南東方向に延びる尾根稜線上に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。これまでに発掘調査は実施されていない。 形状は方形または円形で、直径（一辺）約20メートルを測る。埋葬施設は[[横口式石槨]]で、南方向に開口する{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨の前面に前室・羨道を付すという石棺系横口式石槨の特徴を示す。石槨の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。 * 石槨部：長さ1.9メートル、幅0.75メートル、高さ0.6メートル * 入口部：幅0.58メートル、高さ0.57メートル * 前室・羨道：長さ5.56メートル、幅1.34メートル 石槨の石材は石英[[安山岩]]の切石。石槨部は、底石・奥石では各1石、左右両側壁・天井部では各2石で構築される{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。前室は東側壁5枚・西側壁6枚・天井石3枚{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。特に、南端の天井石では南端から約10センチメートル内側に溝が穿たれている{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。羨道は左右両側壁とも各2石で構築されるが、天井石はない（築造当初から墳丘外に露出）{{Sfn|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}。石槨部と前室部の天井と側壁との接点には漆食の痕跡が認められる。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]][[終末期古墳|終末期]]の[[7世紀]]中葉頃と推定される。 Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|石槨部（奥壁方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|石槨部（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|石槨部開口部 Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|石槨前室（石槨部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|石槨前室（開口部方向） Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|石槨前室 天井石の溝 Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|石槨開口部 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=王公塚古墳|title=大阪府の地名|series=[[日本歴史地名大系]]28|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|王公塚古墳（平凡社）|1986}}}} == 関連文献 {{afc comment|1=See [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
{{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = 34.54049 | coordinates = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|Groove on the front chamber ceiling stone Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|Chamber entrance == References == {{Footnotes}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|(Sources used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=Ōkō Kofun|title=Osaka Prefecture Topography|series=[[Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei]] 28|publisher=[[Heibonsha]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not directly used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=Oko Kofun Group|title=Habikino City History|volume=Volume 3, Historical Records 1|publisher=Habikino City|isbn=|ref=}} == See Also == * [[Kannonzuka Kofun|Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)]] * [[Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] - Habikino City Website {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Habikino City]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Oko Kofun Group]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] [[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]] [[sn:Oko Kofun Group]] [[en:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Oko No. 8 Kofun}} {{translated page|ja|オーコ8号墳|version=100893429|comment=Imported full ja history}}

It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
{{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = 34.54049 | coordinates = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|Groove on the front chamber ceiling stone Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|Chamber entrance == References == {{Footnotes}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|(Sources used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=Ōkō Kofun|title=Osaka Prefecture Topography|series=[[Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei]] 28|publisher=[[Heibonsha]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not directly used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=Oko Kofun Group|title=Habikino City History|volume=Volume 3, Historical Records 1|publisher=Habikino City|isbn=|ref=}} == See Also == * [[Kannonzuka Kofun|Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)]] * [[Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] - revision.comment: Bot: replace redirect category → Kofun of Osaka prefecture
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
{{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = 34.54049 | coordinates = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|Groove on the front chamber ceiling stone Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|Chamber entrance == References == {{Footnotes}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|(Sources used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=Ōkō Kofun|title=Osaka Prefecture Topography|series=[[Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei]] 28|publisher=[[Heibonsha]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not directly used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=Oko Kofun Group|title=Habikino City History|volume=Volume 3, Historical Records 1|publisher=Habikino City|isbn=|ref=}} == See Also == * [[Kannonzuka Kofun|Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)]] * [[Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] - {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = 34.54049 | coordinates = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]].
