revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category History of Habikino City
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
{{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = 34.54049 | coordinates = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|Groove on the front chamber ceiling stone Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|Chamber entrance == References == {{Footnotes}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|(Sources used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=Ōkō Kofun|title=Osaka Prefecture Topography|series=[[Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei]] 28|publisher=[[Heibonsha]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not directly used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=Oko Kofun Group|title=Habikino City History|volume=Volume 3, Historical Records 1|publisher=Habikino City|isbn=|ref=}} == See Also == * [[Kannonzuka Kofun|Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)]] * [[Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] - {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = 34.54049 | coordinates = 135.64262 | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[:en:Andesite|Andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q97311060]] Wikidata name: [[Category:Add wikidata]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
{{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = {{Coord|34.5405|N|135.6426111111111|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[:en:Andesite|Andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = {{Coord|34.5405|N|135.6426111111111|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[:en:Andesite|Andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. revision.comment: Bot: remove invalid enwiki interwiki links
revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q97311060]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
{{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = {{Coord|34.5405|N|135.6426111111111|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[:en:Andesite|Andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|Groove on the front chamber ceiling stone Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|Chamber entrance == References == {{Footnotes}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|(Sources used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=Ōkō Kofun|title=Osaka Prefecture Topography|series=[[Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei]] 28|publisher=[[Heibonsha]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not directly used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=Oko Kofun Group|title=Habikino City History|volume=Volume 3, Historical Records 1|publisher=Habikino City|isbn=|ref=}} == See Also == * [[Kannonzuka Kofun|Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)]] * [[Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] - Habikino City Website {{translated page|ja|オーコ8号墳|version=100893429|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]][[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]][[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]]}} [[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]] [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] [[sn:Oko Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:History of Habikino, Osaka]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] [[Category:Qq 4]] {{wikidata link|Q97311060}}

{{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = {{Coord|34.5405|N|135.6426111111111|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[:en:Andesite|Andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|Groove on the front chamber ceiling stone Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|Chamber entrance == References == {{Footnotes}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|(Sources used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=Ōkō Kofun|title=Osaka Prefecture Topography|series=[[Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei]] 28|publisher=[[Heibonsha]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not directly used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=Oko Kofun Group|title=Habikino City History|volume=Volume 3, Historical Records 1|publisher=Habikino City|isbn=|ref=}} == See Also == * [[Kannonzuka Kofun|Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)]] * [[Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] - Habikino City Website {{translated page|ja|オーコ8号墳|version=100893429|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]][[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]][[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]]}} [[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]] [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] [[sn:Oko Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:History of Habikino, Osaka]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] {{wikidata link|Q97311060}}

revision.text:
[[ja:オーコ8号墳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q97311060]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
{{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = {{Coord|34.5405|N|135.6426111111111|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[:en:Andesite|Andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|Groove on the front chamber ceiling stone Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|Chamber entrance == References == {{Footnotes}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|(Sources used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=Ōkō Kofun|title=Osaka Prefecture Topography|series=[[Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei]] 28|publisher=[[Heibonsha]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not directly used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=Oko Kofun Group|title=Habikino City History|volume=Volume 3, Historical Records 1|publisher=Habikino City|isbn=|ref=}} == See Also == * [[Kannonzuka Kofun|Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)]] * [[Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] - Habikino City Website {{translated page|ja|オーコ8号墳|version=100893429|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]][[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]][[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]]}} [[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]] [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] [[sn:Oko Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:History of Habikino, Osaka]] {{wikidata link|Q97311060}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
{{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = {{Coord|34.5405|N|135.6426111111111|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[:en:Andesite|Andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[:en:Andesite|Andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q97311060]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
{{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = {{Coord|34.5405|N|135.6426111111111|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[:en:Andesite|Andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. revision.comment: Add page with conflicting Wikidata QIDs
revision.text:
[[ja:オーコ8号墳]] [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q97311060]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
{{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan | coordinates = {{Coord|34.5405|N|135.6426111111111|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[:en:Andesite|Andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|Groove on the front chamber ceiling stone Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|Chamber entrance == References == {{Footnotes}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|(Sources used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=Ōkō Kofun|title=Osaka Prefecture Topography|series=[[Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei]] 28|publisher=[[Heibonsha]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not directly used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=Oko Kofun Group|title=Habikino City History|volume=Volume 3, Historical Records 1|publisher=Habikino City|isbn=|ref=}} == See Also == * [[Kannonzuka Kofun|Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)]] * [[Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] - Habikino City Website {{translated page|ja|オーコ8号墳|version=100893429|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]][[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]][[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]]}} [[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]] [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] [[sn:Oko Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:History of Habikino, Osaka]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q97311060}} [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]]

It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[:en:Andesite|Andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz [[:en:Andesite|Andesite]] blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-[[:en:7th century|7th century]] during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-{{ill|7th century|en|7th century|WD=Q8089|lt=7th century}} during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q97311060]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
{{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture}}, Japan | coordinates = {{Coord|34.5405|N|135.6426111111111|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-{{ill|7th century|en|7th century|WD=Q8089|lt=7th century}} | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture}}, Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz {{ill|Andesite|en|Andesite|WD=Q181908|lt=Andesite}} blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-{{ill|7th century|en|7th century|WD=Q8089|lt=7th century}} during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|Groove on the front chamber ceiling stone Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|Chamber entrance == References == {{Footnotes}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|(Sources used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=Ōkō Kofun|title=Osaka Prefecture Topography|series=[[Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei]] 28|publisher=[[Heibonsha]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not directly used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=Oko Kofun Group|title=Habikino City History|volume=Volume 3, Historical Records 1|publisher=Habikino City|isbn=|ref=}} == See Also == * [[Kannonzuka Kofun|Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)]] * [[Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] - Habikino City Website {{translated page|ja|オーコ8号墳|version=100893429|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]][[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]][[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]]}} [[sn:Ōko No. 8 Kofun]] [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] [[sn:Oko Kofun Group]] {{wikidata link|Q97311060}} [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:History of Habikino, Osaka]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz {{ill|Andesite|en|Andesite|WD=Q181908|lt=Andesite}} blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-{{ill|7th century|en|7th century|WD=Q8089|lt=7th century}} during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz {{ill|Andesite|en|Andesite|WD=Q181908|lt=Andesite|1=Andesite}} blocks. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-{{ill|7th century|en|7th century|WD=Q8089|lt=7th century|1=7th century}} during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]]. Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-2.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the back wall) Oko Kofun Group-8, sekkaku-3.jpg|Stone chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-2-2.jpg|Chamber opening Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-1-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the stone chamber) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-3-2.jpg|Front chamber (view toward the entrance) Oko Kofun Group-8, zenshitsu-4.jpg|Groove on the front chamber ceiling stone Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-2-2.jpg|Chamber entrance == References == {{Footnotes}} {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|(Sources used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1986|chapter=Ōkō Kofun|title=Osaka Prefecture Topography|series=[[Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei]] 28|publisher=[[Heibonsha]]|isbn=458249028X|ref={{Harvid|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|(Literature not directly used for article writing)}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=Oko Kofun Group|title=Habikino City History|volume=Volume 3, Historical Records 1|publisher=Habikino City|isbn=|ref=}} == See Also == * [[Kannonzuka Kofun|Kannonzuka Kofun (Habikino City)]] * [[Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun]] == External Links == {{Commonscat|Oko Kofun Group|オーコ古墳群}} * [https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] - Habikino City Website {{translated page|ja|オーコ8号墳|version=100893429|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:sn_crud|TESTŌko No. 8 Kofun]][[Category:sn_crud|TESTŌko No. 8 Kofun]][[Category:sn_crud|TESTŌko No. 8 Kofun]]}} [[Category:sn_crud|TESTŌko No. 8 Kofun]] [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTOko Kofun Group]] {{wikidata link|Q97311060}} [[Category:History of Habikino, Osaka]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

[[ja:オーコ8号墳]] [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] [[ja:オーコ8号墳]] {{Infobox ancient site | name = Oko No. 8 Kofun | image = [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, entrance-1-2.jpg|280px]]
{{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} entrance | alternate_name = Ouko No. 8 Kofun / Oko No. 8 Kofun / Ōkō Kofun | part_of = Oko Kofun Cluster | location = [[Asuka, Habikino City]], {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}, Japan | coordinates = {{Coord|34.5405|N|135.6426111111111|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | type = [[Square Kofun]] or [[Round Kofun]] | area = 20 meters (side length or diameter) | burial = {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} | burial goods = None recorded | burial_mound = | period = Mid-{{ill|7th century|en|7th century|WD=Q8089|lt=7th century|1=7th century}} | Interred_individual = Unknown | historic_site = Not Historic Site1 | notes = | notable = Part of the Oko Kofun Cluster }} '''Oko No. 8 Kofun''' (オーコ8号墳, Ōko Hachigōfun, also Ōkō Kofun) is a [[kofun]] (ancient Kofun) located in [[Asuka, Habikino City]], {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}, Japan. It is one of the tumuli that constitute the Oko Kofun Cluster. The site has not been Historic Site1 as a historic site. == Overview == [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Overhead view of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Oko Kofun Group-8, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone chamber layout}}]] Oko No. 8 Kofun was constructed on a ridge extending southeast from the northeast of the [[Kannonzuka Kofun]]. To date, no excavation surveys have been conducted on the site. The tumulus is square or circular, with an estimated diameter (or side length) of about 20 meters[https://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/soshiki/sekaiisan_bunkazai/bunkazai/bunkazai/iseki_shokai/kofun_shumatsuki/2402.html Oko No. 8 Kofun] (Habikino City website).. The burial facility is a [[horizontal stone chamber]], opening to the south{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The chamber exhibits characteristics of coffin-type horizontal stone chambers, with a front chamber and passage attached to the stone chamber itself. The area are as follows{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}: * Chamber: Length 1.9 m, width 0.75 m, height 0.6 m * Entrance: Width 0.58 m, height 0.57 m * Front chamber/passage: Length 5.56 m, width 1.34 m The chamber walls and ceiling are constructed from cut quartz {{ill|Andesite|en|Andesite|WD=Q181908|lt=Andesite|1=Andesite}} blocks. The chamber's main body includes a base stone and back wall made from single stones, side walls, and a ceiling constructed from two stones each{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The front chamber features five east wall stones, six west wall stones, and three ceiling stones{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. A groove approximately 10 cm from the southern edge of the ceiling stone is particularly noteworthy{{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. The passage is constructed from two stones per side, without ceiling stones (leaving it exposed externally since construction){{Sfn|Ōkō Kofun (Heibonsha)|1986}}. Traces of plaster can be observed at the junctions between walls and ceilings of the chamber and the front room. The construction of Oko No. 8 Kofun is estimated to date to the mid-{{ill|7th century|en|7th century|WD=Q8089|lt=7th century|1=7th century}} during the [[Kofun period|final kofun period]].
